creator: dom@happygiraffe.net
text:
Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of devel/p5-SVN-Notify,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/104995 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/104995

Could you please apply this corrected patch instead?

Thanks,
-Dom
